mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.WRITER_COMPANY, B.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, B.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE, B.MEMBER_NO, (SELECT BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD_TYPE BT WHERE BT.BOARD_TYPE_CODE = B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE) AS BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD B WHERE B.BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N' AND B.BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT BOARD_IMG_NO, BOARD_NO, BOARD_IMG_PATH, BOARD_IMG_OG, BOARD_IMG_RE, BOARD_IMG_ORDER FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY BOARD_IMG_ORDER ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_VIEW_COUNT = BOARD_VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO, BOARD_TYPE_CODE, MEMBER_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_CATEGORY, WRITER_COMPANY ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{boardTypeCode}, #{memberNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardCategory}, #{writerCompany} )

INSERT INTO BOARD_IMAGE ( BOARD_IMG_NO, BOARD_NO, BOARD_IMG_PATH, BOARD_IMG_OG, BOARD_IMG_RE, BOARD_IMG_ORDER ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOARD_IMG_NO.NEXTVAL, #{boardNo}, #{boardImgPath}, #{boardImgOg}, #{boardImgRe}, #{boardImgOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_CATEGORY = #{boardCategory}, WRITER_COMPANY = #{writerCompany}, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'

UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_TITLE = #{boardTitle}, BOARD_CONTENT = #{boardContent}, BOARD_CATEGORY = #{boardCategory}, WRITER_COMPANY = #{writerCompany}, BOARD_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_DEL_FL = 'Y' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_IMG_RE FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO BOARD_IMAGE BI USING ( SELECT BOARD_IMG_NO, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BOARD_IMG_ORDER ASC, BOARD_IMG_NO ASC) - 1 AS NEW_ORDER FROM BOARD_IMAGE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ) T ON (BI.BOARD_IMG_NO = T.BOARD_IMG_NO) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET BI.BOARD_IMG_ORDER = T.NEW_ORDER
mapper.select: SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE, B.MEMBER_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_CONTENT, B.BOARD_WRITE_DATE, B.BOARD_UPDATE_DATE, B.BOARD_VIEW_COUNT, B.BOARD_CATEGORY, B.WRITER_COMPANY, BT.BOARD_NAME FROM BOARD B JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON BT.BOARD_TYPE_CODE = B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE WHERE B.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND B.BOARD_TYPE_CODE = 2 AND B.BOARD_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
